message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

actor "User/Admin" as admin
package "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #LightBlue {
    box "CLI" : CLI
    box "Af Microservice" : AfMicroservice
}

package "5G Core Components" #LightGreen {
    box "NEF" : NEF
    box "NGC CP Function" : NGCCPFunction
}

note right of AfMicroservice: Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

rectangle "Policy Authorization – Application Session Context GET flow" as policyAuthFlow {
    admin -> CLI : Get app session context with appSessionId
    CLI -> AfMicroservice : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
    AfMicroservice -> NEF : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
    NEF -> NGCCPFunction : 
    NGCCPFunction --> NEF : 200 OK: app-session information \ ERROR
    NEF --> AfMicroservice : 
    AfMicroservice --> CLI : 200 OK: app-session information \ ERROR
    CLI --> admin : Success: app-session information
}

footer Proprietary and Confidential
right Intel Corporation
@enduml
```
